title: Emu/Tern CC battery - CC battery level less than 30%, yellow icon
scenario: Charging case battery icon on Home screen does not turn yellow when battery level drops below 30%
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device with a charging case is connected.
Observe the battery icon for the charging case.
Check the battery level of the charging case is less than 30%.
expected: The charging case battery icon on the Home screen displays as yellow when the battery level is less than 30%.
